title: lib.rs quick-start comment 'opens /dev/tpm0 or swtpm socket' is wrong — open() only does /dev/tpm0
description: wolftpm/src/lib.rs quick-start example: 'let mut dev = Device::open()?; // opens /dev/tpm0 or swtpm socket'. Device::open() calls wolfTPM2_Init with the devtpm or autodetect transport — it does NOT open an swtpm socket. That requires Device::open_swtpm(). The misleading comment will send users who want to use swtpm down the wrong path.
